heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny from Lake George and Route 2 northward; decreasing clouds in Vermont between Routes 2 and 4; mostly cloudy from the White Mountains and Route 4 southward, with showers gradually decreasing. Highs in the low to mid 70s in the south, and upper 70s to mid 80s north. East to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly to partly cloudy in southeastern Vermont and southern New Hampshire, with the chance of an early shower; otherwise mainly clear or becoming so. Areas of valley fog, mainly south. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s, some lower 50s northeast. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly sunny after any early fog. Warmer, with highs in the low to mid 80s, some upper 80s in the broad valleys west. Winds variable to southwest at around 5 mph.
